text:
# Page 1^page=1
Cody Rice-Velasquez <crice4485@gmail.com> Immediate Resignation Notice and Update Cody Rice-Velasquez <crice4485@gmail.com> Sun, Jun 7 at 3:22 PM To: lmayes5@humana.com <lmayes5@humana.com>, <comfortkeepersindiana@gmail.com> Hi, I’m following up to make sure my previous message went through. I want to formally confirm that I am resigning from my caregiver position effective immediately due to the current circumstances. The situation that led to this involved increased stress, confusion, and miscommunication, which required me to make a quick decision to protect both of us. Since then, things have de-escalated, and she is currently safe with access to food, medication, oxygen, and basic needs. We have also consulted with medical providers, and it has been indicated that some of the behavior may have been influenced by a combination of stress, anxiety, and possible side effects from long-term medication use, which can impact perception and communication. At this point, I am not able to independently provide the full level of care that she currently needs, and it’s important that a replacement caregiver is arranged as soon as possible to ensure consistent support. If part-time hours are what is currently available, those should continue without interruption while additional coverage is arranged. I can assist in a limited capacity as her son when appropriate, but I cannot be the assigned or primary caregiver moving forward. I also want to make sure that all of my worked hours are accurately reflected in the upcoming paycheck. I have consistently provided care every day, and due to occasional app or clock-in issues, I want to ensure that no time is missing. Please review and confirm that all hours are properly recorded and adjusted if needed so that the upcoming payment reflects the full amount of care provided. If any care is provided by me prior to a replacement being assigned, those hours should be treated as active caregiving time. Please proceed with arranging coverage and confirming payroll accuracy. Please confirm receipt of this notice. Best regards, Cody Rice-Velasquez
